allow: Bash(node -e "const s = require\('@signpdf/signpdf'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(s\)\); console.log\('default:', typeof s.default\); console.log\('sign:', typeof s.sign\); console.log\('default.sign:', typeof \(s.default||{}\).sign\);")
Bash(node -e "const S = require\('@signpdf/signer'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(S\)\); console.log\(typeof S.Signer\);")
Bash(node -e "const s = require\('@signpdf/signpdf'\); const src = s.default.sign.toString\(\); console.log\(src.substring\(0, 500\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const u = require\('@signpdf/signpdf/dist/utils'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(u\)\); console.log\(typeof u.Signer\); if\(u.Signer\) console.log\(u.Signer.toString\(\).substring\(0,200\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const u = require\('@signpdf/utils'\); console.log\('Signer:', typeof u.Signer\); const s = new \(class extends u.Signer {}\); console.log\('instanceof:', s instanceof u.Signer\);")
